visualizerParams.title: Clean Articulation Point Discovery
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The current `compute_ap` function uses a lot of local variable initialization and nested functions. Refactor it to use a cleaner, class-based approach or to encapsulate the state more clearly using more Pythonic techniques.

solution.explanation: Refactoring the algorithm into a class provides much better encapsulation. The state is clearly defined in the instance variables (`self.disc`, `self.low`, `self.time`), eliminating the need for `nonlocal` and nested functions. It follows the SRP principle by separating initialization from the computation logic.
